1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

3.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons limited to Kristiansand extent

4.description: get flood zones (flomareal) limited to Kristiansand extent

6.description: find parcels from previous step that also intersect flood zones

7.description: deduplicate to one row per parcel and get teigid

9.description: return top 10 parcels by teigid ascending

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, kommunenummer, lagretberegnetareal
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT omrade FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE omrade && (SELECT ST_Extent(omrade) FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '4204');
